evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 30954398. 2019/07/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Monotherapy consisting of radiotherapy or chemotherapy has limited 
efficacy in pancreatic tumors. This study aims to investigate whether the 
combination of 125I brachytherapy and gemcitabine (GEM) chemotherapy has a 
synergistic effect on pancreatic cancer (PC).
METHODS: In vitro, PANC-1 cells in the exponential phase were treated with 125I 
radioactive seeds (6 Gy) and GEM (30 nM). Cell proliferation, apoptosis, and
